fields.useCase: Real-time claims fraud detection at FNOL (first notice of loss)
fields.riskNotes: Benefit case depends on SIU capacity to work the additional referrals; false-positive rate above 20% would erode adjuster trust and the benefit.
fields.recommendation: Proceed: payback inside 15 months at conservative detection-uplift assumptions; fund PoC + pilot as one gate-reviewed program.
